'''Santhar squad''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] military unit consisting of seven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. They had orders to retrieve an unknown object after the [[Battle of Taul|Battle]] of [[Taul/Legends|Taul]]. They participated in the subsequent [[skirmish on Taul]], and the members of the squad were armed with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]]. Two of the squad were [[Specialist/Legends|specialists]] and carried a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] each.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Return to Taul}}
